title: Set -env variables as appropriate
body:
close #3648

podman create and podman run do not set --env value if the environment is not present with a value

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @giuseppe has you change been addressed?  Can you remove the request if so please?
